# Vertiv — Products for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-30

## Market Position
- **70%+ volume share** of first-batch GB200 NVL72 rack CDU shipments
- Hyperscale-first deployer for Blackwell liquid cooling
- NVIDIA DSX reference partner

## CoolChip CDU 121 — NVL72 Per-Rack CDU
- **Capacity:** 121 kW per rack
- **Form factor:** 4U, in-rack or adjacent
- **Certified:** On NVIDIA RVL/AVL for NVL72 deployments
- Variable speed pump + intelligent flow control
- Integrated leak detection + auto shutoff
- SNMP / BACnet / Trellis monitoring

## CoolChip CDU 2300
- Up to 2.3 MW capacity per unit
- Supports water/glycol and dielectric fluids
- 45C+ supply water (waste heat reuse compatible)
- Variable speed pumps, intelligent flow management
- Integrated leak detection with auto shutoff
- Trellis / LIFE Services, SNMP, BACnet monitoring
- Status: SHIPPING NOW

## 800V DC Portfolio (H2 2026)
- Complete 800V DC product line coming H2 2026:
  - 800V DC PDUs (rack-level)
  - 800V DC busway systems
  - AC-to-800V DC rectifier/converter modules
  - 800V DC switchgear and protection
  - Liebert-branded DC products
- Pre-production with hyperscale partners now
- General availability H2 2026

## Containerized / Modular
- SmartMod — prefab modular AI factory modules
- Being updated for 800V DC (H2 2026)
- Liebert DCD — containerized power distribution
- PowerCore — modular, scalable power blocks

## NVIDIA DSX Partner
- CoolChip CDU qualified for NVL72 rack cooling
- Joint reference architectures published
